final.sql:
SELECT 
    r_reason_desc,
    sr_channel,
    SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amount
FROM (
    SELECT 
        sr_return_amt,
        r_reason_desc,
        'store' AS sr_channel
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN reason ON sr_reason_sk = r_reason_sk
    WHERE d_year = 1998 AND d_moy = 5

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        cr_return_amt,
        r_reason_desc,
        'catalog' AS sr_channel
    FROM catalog_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON cr_r...
